rules.name: project-frontmatter-schema
rules.evidence:
title: 'Project Title'
date: '2023-01-01'
location: 'City, Country'
coordinates: [latitude, longitude]  # For map display
description: 'Project description'
type: 'architecture'                # Used for filtering
tags: ['tag1', 'tag2']
authors:
  - name: 'Author Name'
    role: 'Role'
featured: true                      # Shows on homepage

uncompilable: Custom component naming convention (Ak prefix, e.g. AkHeader, AkProjectCard) — coding style at large, not a per-action obligation
Node.js 20+ and pnpm locked to 9.12.0 — environment/toolchain prerequisite, not tied to a specific tool call

Development Commands list (pnpm dev/build/deploy/preview/lint/format/optimize-images/clean-images) — usage catalog documenting what can be run, with no obligation, prohibition, or ordering attached to any of them
CUSTOM_DOMAIN=true env var note for removing the base path — conditional how-to documentation for an optional deployment scenario, not a general rule for the deploy action
